positive: A vibrant, symmetrical celestial mandala design featuring interwoven cosmic elements: crescent moons, stylized nebulas, geometric constellations, and ethereal cosmic dust. The primary palette should utilize deep indigo, brilliant gold foil accents, teal, and touches of magenta. The composition must be highly detailed, central, and presented as a clean silhouette or graphic suitable for screen printing on fabric. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Mythological Scientific Diagram, ultra-detailed, linework focused, high contrast, symmetrical, flat graphic design, 8k, concept art, perfect composition, vector quality.
negative: blurry, artifacts, grainy, noisy, text, watermark, logo, copyright, dirty, ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, poorly drawn, muted colors
